package rulecoverage

func NegativeHardcodedTlsSkipVerify() string {
    ruleID := "hardcoded_tls_skip_verify"
    family := "security"
    severity := "error"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`tls.Config{InsecureSkipVerify: true}` in non-test code"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
